## Checklist

- [ ] I searched the backlog, including Deferred and Screened out for now.
- [ ] I added no book, ebook, scraped text, or generated dataset file.
- [ ] I proposed no more than five closely related works.
- [ ] I did not mark the work as legally cleared merely because it appears online or in another dataset.
- [ ] I explained a concrete reason the work would improve the corpus.
